title: pleurocitrus inodora
intro: Pleurocitrus inodora, also known as the 'Ecuadorian lime', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in Ecuador and Colombia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pleurocitrus inodora include treating digestive issues, fever reduction, and skin problems, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, allowing for various uses in aromatherapy and natural remedies.
